# CombineIdentifier

**Structure**

A unique identifier for identifying publisher streams.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CombineIdentifier
```

## Overview

To conform to [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/CustomCombineIdentifierConvertible] in a [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subscription] or [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/Subject] that you implement as a structure, create an instance of [doc://com.apple.Combine/documentation/Combine/CombineIdentifier] as follows:

```swift
let combineIdentifier = CombineIdentifier()
```

## Creating a Combine identifier

- **init()**: Creates a unique Combine identifier.
- **init(_:)**: Creates a Combine identifier, using the bit pattern of the provided object.

## Providing a description

- **description**: A textual representation of this instance.

## Debugging Identifiers

- **CustomCombineIdentifierConvertible**: A protocol for uniquely identifying publisher streams.

## Conforms To

- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
